title: 解释价格差异和涨价原因
theme: 从 price difference / increase / target price 开始
goals: 能解释为什么不同数量、规格或包装会导致价格差异
能说明涨价原因，同时保持客户关系和谈判空间
能询问客户目标价，并用商务方式争取可执行条件

review.title: Day 10 复习
items: 今天回到报价深化：客户问为什么价格变高、为什么和上次不同、能不能再便宜。
解释价格时，不要只说 cost up，要说明影响因素，并给客户下一步选择。

preview.scenario: 客户对报价不满意，质疑价格比上次高、比竞争对手高，或者要求保持旧价格。
needToKnow: price difference 要说明具体原因，例如 quantity、material、packaging、exchange rate。
increase 用于解释涨价，但要避免听起来像单方面通知客户。
target price 可以帮助你判断是否有谈判空间，而不是盲目降价。

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释新旧报价、不同数量或不同规格之间的价格不同。
vocabulary.example: The price difference is mainly caused by the lower quantity.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明材料、包装、运费或成本上涨。
vocabulary.example: The material cost has increased recently.

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释生产成本和价格变化。
vocabulary.example: The raw material cost is higher than before.

vocabulary.usage: 用于说明汇率变化影响报价。
vocabulary.example: The exchange rate has changed, so the price is slightly different.

vocabulary.usage: 用于客户要求降价或大数量优惠。
vocabulary.example: We can offer a small discount for a larger quantity.

vocabulary.usage: 用于解释价格已经很低或让步空间有限。
vocabulary.example: Our margin is already very limited for this order.

vocabulary.usage: 用于询问客户期望价格，便于评估是否能调整。
vocabulary.example: Could you please share your target price?

vocabulary.usage: 用于价格、条款或订单条件的商务协商。
vocabulary.example: We can discuss the price further during negotiation.

sentences.label: 解释价格差异
sentences.natural: The price is different because the quantity is different.
sentences.business: The price difference is mainly caused by the lower quantity and updated packaging requirement.

sentences.label: 说明原材料上涨
sentences.natural: The material cost has increased recently.
sentences.business: The raw material cost has increased recently, so the unit price is slightly higher than before.

sentences.label: 询问目标价
sentences.business: Could you please share your target price so I can check if there is any room to adjust?

sentences.label: 说明利润有限
sentences.natural: It is difficult to offer a discount for this quantity.
sentences.business: For this quantity, our margin is already very limited, but I can check again with our manager.

sentences.label: 给条件式优惠
sentences.natural: The price can be lower if the quantity is higher.
sentences.business: If you can increase the quantity, we can apply for a better discount for you.

chatAnalysis.problem: 太直接，像单方面通知客户涨价，没有解释原因。
chatAnalysis.better: The material cost has increased recently.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: The raw material cost has increased recently, so the unit price is slightly higher than before.

chatAnalysis.problem: 容易让谈判结束，客户会觉得没有空间。
chatAnalysis.better: It is difficult to offer a discount for this quantity.
chatAnalysis.upgrade: For this quantity, our margin is already very limited, but I can check again with our manager.

chatAnalysis.problem: 语气容易冒犯客户，应该询问目标价并说明评估。
chatAnalysis.better: Could you please share your target price?
chatAnalysis.upgrade: Could you please share your target price so I can check if there is any room to adjust?

dialogues.title: 慢速基础版：客户问为什么更贵

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Why is the price higher than last time?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The raw material cost has increased recently, so the unit price is slightly higher than before.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you keep the old price?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I will check again with our manager and see if there is any room to adjust.

dialogues.title: 正常商务版：客户要求折扣

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you give us a better discount?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: For this quantity, our margin is already very limited.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We may increase the quantity later.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you can increase the quantity now, we can apply for a better discount for you.

dialogues.title: 压力场景版：客户拿竞争对手压价

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Your competitor offered a lower price.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Could you please confirm if their material, packaging, and quantity are the same?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I am not sure.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The price difference may come from different material, packaging, or order conditions.

longDialogues.title: 长对话实战：解释涨价、询问目标价并争取订单

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Hi, your new price is higher than last time.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you for your feedback. Let me explain the price difference clearly.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please explain. We expected the old price.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: The raw material cost has increased recently, and the exchange rate has also changed.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: But the product looks the same.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Yes, the product looks the same, but the production cost is higher than before.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you keep the old price for this order?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand your request. For this quantity, our margin is already very limited.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We have another supplier with a lower price.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: I understand. Could you please confirm if their material, packaging, and quantity are the same?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: The packaging may be different.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: That may explain part of the price difference because customized packaging can affect the cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Can you reduce the packaging cost?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: We can check if standard packaging can help reduce the cost.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: What is the best price you can offer?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Could you please share your target price so I can check if there is any room to adjust?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Our target price is 2.3 dollars.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will check this target price with our manager and factory.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: If we order 3,000 pieces, can you do better?

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: If you can increase the quantity to 3,000 pieces, we can apply for a better discount.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please check both 2,000 and 3,000 pieces.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Sure. I will compare the price for 2,000 pieces and 3,000 pieces for you.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: We need your final offer today.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Understood. I will check the best possible price and update you today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: Please try your best. We want to place the order.

lines.speaker: Sales
lines.text: Thank you. I will do my best, but I also need to make sure the price is workable for production.

exercises.prompt: 中译英：原材料成本最近上涨了。
exercises.answer: The raw material cost has increased recently.
acceptable: the raw material cost has increased recently
raw material cost has increased recently
exercises.hint: raw material 表示原材料，increase 表示上涨。

exercises.prompt: 把这句话改得更自然：no discount
exercises.answer: For this quantity, our margin is already very limited.
acceptable: for this quantity our margin is already very limited
our margin is already very limited for this quantity
exercises.hint: 不要直接拒绝，用 margin 说明原因。

exercises.prompt: 填空：Could you please share your target ____?
客户说 Your competitor offered a lower price. 哪个回复更适合？
options: Could you please confirm if their material, packaging, and quantity are the same?
exercises.answer: Could you please confirm if their material, packaging, and quantity are the same?
acceptable: could you please confirm if their material packaging and quantity are the same
exercises.hint: 先确认比较条件是否一致。

exercises.prompt: 中译英：如果你能增加数量，我们可以申请更好的折扣。
exercises.answer: If you can increase the quantity, we can apply for a better discount.
acceptable: if you can increase the quantity we can apply for a better discount
if you can increase the quantity we can offer a better discount
exercises.hint: apply for a better discount 表示申请更好的折扣。

exercises.prompt: 客户说：Why is the price higher than last time? 你应该怎么回复？
exercises.answer: The raw material cost has increased recently, so the unit price is slightly higher than before.
acceptable: the raw material cost has increased recently so the unit price is slightly higher than before
the raw material cost has increased so the price is slightly higher than before
exercises.hint: 说明具体原因，不要只说 price increase。

homework: 把 price difference、increase、raw material、margin、target price 各造 1 句。
把 5 个核心句子的 business 版本各读 5 遍。
跟读长对话 2 遍，重点练解释涨价和询问目标价。
tomorrow: Day 12 会练模具费、开模时间和模具归属。
